title: Trade Observation (fact_trade_observation)
description: A trade-flow observation: import or export value or volume for a reporter/partner pair over a data period. Mode-neutral -- placement.transport_mode carries the mode when the source reports one, and 'not_applicable' when the source reports all-mode totals.

partner_country_id.description: Partner country when the source reports at country level; null when the observation is a regional aggregate or a world total.

partner_scope.description: The actual resolution of the partner dimension. The Dashboard must state this rather than implying country resolution the source did not provide.

commodity_scope.description: Commodity coverage, e.g. 'all_commodities'. Null when the source does not state one.
